title: Prepare compatible Decidim runtime
evidence: Ruby, Bundler, PostgreSQL, Node, npm, image tools, browser test path
stop_condition: Runtime cannot install or run Decidim

title: Select hosting path
evidence: Provider, partner, VPS, Docker, or hold-only decision

title: Refresh GitHub project scope
evidence: gh auth refresh --scopes project if native Project board is required
stop_condition: Native Project board required but project scope missing

title: Create sandbox admin account plan
evidence: Admin owner, backup admin, support contact, recovery path

title: Create organisation shell
evidence: Organisation URL, name, logo, languages, terms pages, support content

title: Create assembly and process
evidence: Assembly, participatory process, phases, categories, public pages

title: Configure components
evidence: Proposals, meetings, surveys, supports, accountability, pages

title: Seed fake data only
evidence: Static sample CSV/JSON mapped and reviewed before import
stop_condition: Real or unclear data enters sandbox

title: Run fake-data boundary audit
stop_condition: Real data or cultural material appears

title: Run QA and accessibility checks
evidence: Desktop/mobile screenshots, public visitor path, admin path, keyboard and contrast notes

title: Confirm privacy and terms content
evidence: Privacy note, terms page, retention note, no-real-data statement

title: Create support and backup plan
evidence: Support window, escalation, update path, backup owner, known limitations

title: Complete assurance sign-off
evidence: Assurance Room all gates ready or explicit hold/no-go decision
